name: Dollar Tree
analysis: DLTR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry $111.6500, stop $104.1678, target $135.1800 (3.14:1) — then trail it.
